titleStmt.title: SII 26.476: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 476. (A.R. No. 453 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Āṉaikātta Perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records an order of the king granting some land in Marudāṉnambikuṟuchchi in the eastern quarter of Śrīvallava-maṅgalam in Kīḻkaḷakkūṟṟam to provide for worship and offerings in the temple of the god Kāṇaviṉiya Viṇṇagarāḻvār built by Śēyāṉ Tūmāmaṇiyāṉ (cf. No. 478 below) alias Kulaśēkarapaṉmaṉ of Maṇaṟpaḍaivīḍu in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, at the same place. The order was issued at the instance of Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyaṉ. It is stated that from the area in which the gift-land was situated, the land belonging to the sabhai of the village and those cultivated by Sundarapāṇḍya Maḻavarāyar were excluded. It is further stated that the levies and taxes due from the land which the king's uncle (ammāṉ) Muṉayadaraiyar had bought or got on lease from the sabhai were included in the gift which was declared as tax-free dēvadāna.
It is to be noted that amongst the boundaries of the gift-land a certain canal called Kulaśēkaraṉkāl is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
prasātañ ceytaruḷiya tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉac cakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu maṇaṟpaṭai
viṭṭuc ceyāṉ tūmāmaṇiyāṉa kulacekarapaṉmaṉ Ivvūril Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kāṇaviṉiyaviṇṇakarāḻvār ko
yil nampu ceyvāṉukkum śrīvaiṣṇavaṟkum Ivvāḻvāṟkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku Ikkūṟ
ṟattu śrīvallavamaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai marutāṉnampikuṟiccippaṟṟukkuñ celvaṉerikkuṅ kiḻellai Ivvūṟ brā
hmaṇaraṉupavittu varukiṟa toṭṭak kūṟṟukkun taṇporunta Āṟṟukku meṟkun teṉ Ellai kulacekarakālukku (vaṭa)vaṭak
kum melellai marutāṉanampikuṟiccippilāṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai taṇporunta Āṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaik
kuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Ivvūr sabhaiyāraṉupavittu varukiṟa nilamum cuntarapāṇṭiya maḻavarāyaruḻavāṉa nilam mukkālu
n nikki Ivvūṟ sabhaiyār pakkal Ammāṉ muṉaiyataraiyar vilaiyum Oṟṟiyuṅ koṇṭaṉupavittu varukiṟa nattamun
toṭṭamu muṭpaṭṭa nilaṅ kaṭamai poṉvariyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭ
ṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum pāṭikkāvalum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Eṭṭāvatu mutal tevattāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāka yiṟuppatāka Iṭappeṟaveṉūmeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuccoṉṉamaiyil Ivvāḻvāṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭun nivantaṅkaḷukku Iccivallamaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai marutāṉnampikuṟicci paṟṟukkum celvanerikkum kiḻellai Ivvūṟ brāhma
ṇaraṉūpavittu varukiṟa toṭṭakkūṟṟukkun taṉporunta Āṟṟukku meṟkun teṉ Ellai kulacekaraṉkālukku vaṭakkum melellai marutāṉnam
pikuṟicci pilāṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai taṇporunta Āṟṟukku teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil Ivvūṟ sabhaiyāra
ṉupavittu varukiṟa nilamum cuntarapāṇṭiya maḻavarāyaruḻavāṉa nilam mukkālum nikki Ivvūṟ sabhaiyār pakkal Ammāṉ muṉaiya
taraiyar vilaiyum Oṟṟiyuṅ koṇṭaṉūpavittu varukiṟa nattamun toṭṭamu muṭpaṭṭa nilam kuṭimaiyum Antarāya viṉiyokam taruvatā
ṉa Accuṅ kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili ka kāvalum maṟṟum Eppeyaṟ paṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa Ivvā
ṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟuppatāka Iṭṭuva naṅkeḻviyuntaracoṉṉom Ippaṭi candrātityava
ṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai ttup putupper kuḷattām
Digital edition of SII 26.476 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
